faq.question: <span style="color: #262626;">Why do you have to allow 15 inches over the door?</span>
faq.answer: For the integrity of the bulkhead strength in the door area.
faq.catdescription: One Piece Skinny Bun FAQ for ITW Insulated Products

faq.question: <p>What color vinyl is standard?</p>
faq.answer: <p>Normally Blue Vinyl but other colors are available possibly at a longer lead time</p>
faq.catdescription: One Piece Skinny Bun FAQ for ITW Insulated Products

faq.question: <p>Can the options of a Fan, Vent or Logistic straps be added?</p>
faq.answer: <p>Yes, any of the options can be added to the One Piece with Door or the standard One Piece Bulkhead.</p>
faq.catdescription: One Piece Skinny Bun FAQ for ITW Insulated Products

faq.question: <p>What is the door height?</p>
faq.answer: <p>The door height is determined by the actual inside height of your truck or trailer. i.e. If your inside height is 89 inches we would take 15 inches off of that to equal a door height of 74 inches.</p>
faq.catdescription: One Piece Skinny Bun FAQ for ITW Insulated Products

faq.question: <p>What is the door width?</p>
faq.answer: The door normally is 32 inches wide.
faq.catdescription: One Piece Skinny Bun FAQ for ITW Insulated Products

faq.question: <p>Can the door be placed in the center?</p>
faq.answer: <p>Yes the door can be placed in the center but it cost more because a threshold has to be included for the support of the center door.</p>
faq.catdescription: One Piece Skinny Bun FAQ for ITW Insulated Products

faq.question: <p>If I order the One Piece with the Door option where is the door placed?</p>
faq.answer: <p>The door is normally placed on either the road (left) or curbside (right)</p>
faq.catdescription: One Piece Skinny Bun FAQ for ITW Insulated Products

faq.question: <p>Is it considered a custom bulkhead?</p>
faq.answer: <p>Yes, both the One Piece and the One Piece with Door is custom made to the inside dimensions of your truck or trailer.</p>
faq.catdescription: One Piece Skinny Bun FAQ for ITW Insulated Products

faq.question: <p>How thick is the One Piece bulkhead?</p>
faq.catdescription: One Piece Skinny Bun FAQ for ITW Insulated Products
